title: Explain the main training entry point of a codebase
objective: Identify the main training loop, key model entry point, and supporting files in a repo.
success_criteria: Names the main entry file or function
Names the core model or trainer component
Points to at least two supporting files
constraints: Prefer structural explanation over line-by-line paraphrase
hints: Look for train.py, main(), trainer classes, and model definitions.
